<!-- DO NOT IGNORE THE TEMPLATE!

Thanks for taking the time to open a PR. In an era where AI assistance is common, what matters more than whether the diff “looks human” is **whether you can explain how you produced it**.

If you used AI in this work (including but not limited to completions, chat, agents, generated tests, etc.), fill in the **AI collaboration** section below. If you did everything by hand with no AI, say so briefly so reviewers know what to expect.

Before submitting the PR, please make sure you do the following:

- Read the [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/antfu/contribute) (if this repo has its own guide, follow that instead).
- Check that there isn't already a PR that solves the problem the same way to avoid creating a duplicate.
- Provide a description that addresses **what** this PR solves and **why**, or reference the issue (e.g. `fixes #123`).
- Ideally, include relevant tests that fail without this PR but pass with it.

-->
